thresholdSource: criticalHigh 150: vitamin D intoxication threshold — 'Concentrations over 150 ng/mL (325 nmol/L) may result in vitamin D intoxication' (StatPearls NBK441912). plausibleHigh 1000: above documented survivable 25-OH-D 516 ng/mL (1289 nmol/L; PMC10333361), so real toxicity is held, not masked. No criticalLow (deficiency is chronic, not acute). Draft — not clinician-approved.
